stemHtml: An aerodrome has two runways with an Approach Lighting System (ALS) installed for both of them. Runway 03L has a displaced threshold of 150 meters, while Runway 16 does not have a displaced threshold. Which statement is true about the location of the ALS for these runways?

options.a: There is a difference because the ALS for runway 03L is based on a point located 150 m from the displaced threshold and the ALS for runway 06 is based on the threshold.
options.b: There is NO difference, the ALS for runway 03L and the ALS for runway 16 are both based on the extremity edge of the pavement.
options.c: There is NO difference, the ALS for the runway 03L and the ALS for the runway 16 are both based on the threshold.
options.d: There is a difference because the ALS on the runway 16 is based on a point located 300 m from the threshold and the ALS for runway 03L is based on the threshold.
